subcodes.first_line: Know ye, O concourse of earth and heaven, that I am He Who hath made all deeds dependent upon My good-pleasure [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: اعرفوا یا ملأ الأرض و السمآء بأنی انا الذی قد علق کل الأعمال برضائی
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @quotation from or interpretation of the Bible, @rebellion and misdeeds of Mirza Yahya; the Azalis, @corruption; misinterpretation of the Word of God, @suffering and imprisonment, @prophecy and fulfillment, @stories; anecdotes, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @Manifestation of God speaking in the voice of Divinity, @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life, @firmness in the Covenant, @chastisement and requital, @proofs of the Manifestations of God, @martyrs and martyrdom, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world
